name: Merge Animals Defence
description: Merge Animals Defence Step into the lab and unleash your inner mad scientist! Merge DNA of different animals to create a powerful animal army and defend your base from waves of enemies. Strategically combine unique traits—eagle wings to strike from above, tiger claws for close combat, and rabbit speed for quick attacks. Plan your defence, upgrade your mutants, and dominate every battle. A fast-paced strategy shooter with crazy science, colorful graphics, and endless genetic possibilities.
instructions: Mouse click or tap to play
